title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic city portrait with still subject and moving crowd. Subject: adult woman with short tousled hair and calm introspective gaze, wearing soft beige knit sweater, textured brown skirt, and minimal earrings, perfectly still and razor-sharp. Expression: quiet, centered, slightly melancholic, gaze meets or nearly meets camera with quiet emotional weight. Scene: busy crosswalk near old brick storefronts, pedestrians surrounding the subject rendered as dreamy long-exposure motion streaks around shoulder level. Camera: 35mm lens at f/1.8, shallow depth of field, subject-background contrast. Light and Palette: soft natural daylight after rain; muted beige, brown, grey pavement, and warm brick tones; film photography texture. Restrictions: Keep subject face sharp, no distorted crowd limbs, no plastic skin, no fake HDR, no random text.
